2605.11453.title: Predictive Maps of Multi-Agent Reasoning: A Successor-Representation Spectrum for LLM Communication Topologies
2605.11453.paper_summary: Practitioners deploying multi-agent large language model (LLM) systems must currently choose between communication topologies such as chain, star, mesh, and richer variants without any pre-inference diagnostic for which topology will amplify drift, converge to consensus, or remain robust under perturbation. Existing evaluation answers these questions only post hoc and only for the task measured. We introduce a structural diagnostic for multi-agent LLM communication graphs based on the successor representation $M = (I - γP)^{-1}$ of the row-stochastic communication operator, and we connect three of its spectral quantities, the spectral radius $ρ(M)$, the spectral gap $Δ(M)$, and the condition number $κ(M)$, to three distinct failure modes. We derive closed-form spectra for the chain, star, and mesh under row-stochastic normalization, and validate the predictions on a 12-step structured state-tracking task with Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct over 100 independent trials. The condition number is a perfect rank-order predictor of empirical perturbation robustness ($r_s = 1.0$); the spectral gap partially predicts consensus dynamics ($r_s = 0.5$); and the spectral radius is perfectly \emph{inverted} with respect to cumulative error ($r_s = -1.0$). We trace this inversion to a regime in which linear spectra are blind to non-contracting bias drift, and we propose an affine-noise extension of the predictive map that recovers the empirical ordering. We read this as a first step toward representational, drift-aware structural diagnostics for multi-agent LLM systems, sitting alongside classical spectral and consensus theory.
2605.11453.paper_summary_zh: 實踐者在部署多代理大型語言模型（LLM）系統時，必須在鏈、星形、網狀和更豐富的變體等通信拓撲之間進行選擇，而目前沒有任何預推斷診斷可以判斷哪種拓撲會放大漂移、收斂到共識或在擾動下保持穩健。現有的評估僅在事後回答這些問題，且僅針對所測量的任務。我們引入了一種基於行隨機通信運算符的後繼表示 $M = (I - γP)^{-1}$ 的多代理 LLM 通信圖的結構診斷，並將其三個光譜量，光譜半徑 $ρ(M)$、光譜間隙 $Δ(M)$ 和條件數 $κ(M)$，與三種不同的失敗模式聯繫起來。我們推導了在行隨機正規化下鏈、星形和網狀的封閉形式光譜，並在 100 次獨立試驗中，使用 Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct 驗證了在 12 步結構狀態跟踪任務上的預測。條件數是實證擾動穩健性的完美排名順序預測器（$r_s = 1.0$）；光譜間隙部分預測共識動態（$r_s = 0.5$）；而光譜半徑則與累積誤差完美地 \emph{反轉}（$r_s = -1.0$）。我們將這一反轉追溯到一種線性光譜對非收縮偏差漂移無法感知的範疇，並提出了一種仿射噪聲擴展的預測映射，以恢復實證排序。我們將此視為朝著多代理 LLM 系統的表徵、漂移感知結構診斷邁出的第一步，與傳統的光譜和共識理論並列。
2605.11453.author: Ethan David James Park et.al.
2605.11453.authors: Ethan David James Park, Dalal Alharthi
